title: Halloween Structures Mod
description: Adds structures from the MC console edition's Halloween Mashup pack.
body:
Adding structures straight out from the MC Console Edition's Halloween Mashup pack Adventure map into the world generation.

**You'll obviously need the original Halloween Mashup texture pack, if not most structures will look horrible.**

It doesn't add much loot or crazy dungeons. Just good looking strutures that decorate the landscape and add to the spooky vibe. Thing which may change in the future.

Structures are 90% accurate, outside of some changes to add funcionality to some strucutres and make sure it doesn't affect game balance.

It's still work in progress, there's still some structures to be added and some of the added structures are incomplete. 
I may add structures of my own to fill missing gaps, as back in the day the team behind the adventure map didn't cover all the biomes of that time, like the Savanna and Bad lands. And of course new biomes have been added since then. I may even add a new biome ¿? time will tell.

I'm very new into world generation tweaks, so if you have any suggestions or point out something that i could improve, you can tell me here: [https://github.com/xelotex/Halloween-Structures/issues](https://github.com/xelotex/Halloween-Structures/issues)

Feel free to add this to your modpack.

Check out my other projects!:

[https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/halloween-mashup-pack-music-only.](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/halloween-mashup-pack-music-only.)

[https://modrinth.com/modpack/absolute-kombat-2.0](https://modrinth.com/modpack/absolute-kombat-2.0)
